summary: Iteration 266: Email Preview Dialog Feature Testing Complete. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed via Playwright. Verified: 1) GET /api/invoices/{id}/preview-email returns all_recipients array with correct default flags (email=default:true, pec=default:false), 2) POST /api/invoices/{id}/send-email correctly handles to_emails array (first=to, rest=cc), 3) EmailPreviewDialog renders checkboxes for each recipient, 4) Standard email is pre-selected by default, PEC is not, 5) Send button shows correct count when multiple recipients selected ('Conferma invio a 2'), 6) Send button is disabled when no emails selected or confirmation not checked, 7) Manual email addition via '+ Aggiungi email' button works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend preview-email endpoint correctly collects all emails: client.email, client.pec, and contacts
Backend sets email as default=true, PEC as default=false (line 1301-1303 in invoices.py)
Backend send-email correctly processes to_emails array: first email as TO, rest as CC (line 1379-1381)
Frontend EmailPreviewDialog correctly pre-selects recipients with default=true flag
Frontend uses selectedEmails state to track multiple recipient selection
Frontend send button correctly shows count: 'Conferma invio a {count}' when multiple selected
Frontend disables send button when selectedEmails.length === 0 or !confirmed
All required data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing invoices: inv_698ab9f8a8c2 (Galotti Srl - has email+PEC), inv_d2f0007bcdf0 (Electric Style Snc - email only)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email preview dialog feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoint at GET /api/invoices/{id}/preview-email returns all_recipients array with email/pec/contact types and default flags. Frontend EmailPreviewDialog shows checkboxes for all recipients, pre-selects defaults, allows manual email addition, and shows recipient count on send button.

TestPreviewEmailEndpoint.test_preview_email_standard_email_is_def: PASS - Email has default=true, PEC has default=false
TestPreviewEmailEndpoint.test_preview_email_recipient_structure: PASS - Each recipient has email, label, type, default fields
TestPreviewEmailEndpoint.test_preview_email_only_client: PASS - Client with only email works correctly

TestFrontendEmailPreviewDialog.test_dialog_has_checkbox_for_recipients: PASS - Uses Checkbox component with selectedEmails state
TestFrontendEmailPreviewDialog.test_dialog_has_manual_email_input: PASS - Has 'Aggiungi email' button and ccInput state
TestFrontendEmailPreviewDialog.test_dialog_has_data_testids: PASS - All required data-testid attributes present

TestBackendCodeReview.test_preview_email_collects_all_emails: PASS - Collects email, PEC, and contacts
TestBackendCodeReview.test_send_email_handles_to_emails_array: PASS - First email as TO, rest as CC

PlaywrightUITests.test_galotti_invoice_email_dialog: PASS - Email checkbox checked, PEC checkbox unchecked
PlaywrightUITests.test_maya_invoice_email_dialog: PASS - Email checkbox checked, manual email addition works
PlaywrightUITests.test_send_button_count: PASS - Shows 'Conferma invio a 2' with 2 recipients
PlaywrightUITests.test_confirmation_checkbox: PASS - Send button enabled after confirmation checked

verified_features.backend_preview_email: VERIFIED - Returns all_recipients with correct default flags
verified_features.frontend_checkboxes: VERIFIED - Renders checkboxes for each recipient
verified_features.frontend_default_selection: VERIFIED - Email pre-selected, PEC not pre-selected
verified_features.frontend_send_button_count: VERIFIED - Shows recipient count when multiple selected
verified_features.frontend_send_button_disabled: VERIFIED - Disabled when no selection or no confirmation
